'''dhokaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:picaresque|picaresque]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:picaresque|picaresque]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhokaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || dhokarithi || dhokariji || dhokarishi || dhokariki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || dhokaruthu || dhokaruju || dhokarushu || dhokaruku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || dhokaruthu || dhokaruju || dhokarushu || dhokaruku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || dhokarufthuf || dhokarufjuf || dhokarufshuf || dhokarufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || dhokarethe || dhokareje || dhokareshe || dhokareke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || dhokarotho || dhokarojo || dhokarosho || dhokaroko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || dhokarotho || dhokarojo || dhokarosho || dhokaroko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || dhokarofthof || dhokarofjof || dhokarofshof || dhokarofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhokarïfthïf || dhokarïfjïf || dhokarïfshïf || dhokarïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhokarïfthïf || dhokarïfjïf || dhokarïfshïf || dhokarïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhokarïfthïf || dhokarïfjïf || dhokarïfshïf || dhokarïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhokarïfthïf || dhokarïfjïf || dhokarïfshïf || dhokarïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || dhokaræthæ || dhokaræjæ || dhokaræshæ || dhokarækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || dhokaratha || dhokaraja || dhokarasha || dhokaraka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || dhokaratha || dhokaraja || dhokarasha || dhokaraka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || dhokarafthaf || dhokarafjaf || dhokarafshaf || dhokarafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || dhokarasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || dhokarshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || dhokarroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || dhokarmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || dhokaryaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godhokarnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godhokarnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godhokarnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godhokarnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || dhokakarasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || dhokakarshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || dhokakarroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || dhokakarmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || dhokakaryaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godhokakarnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godhokakarnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godhokakarnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godhokakarnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || dhekærasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || dhekærshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || dhekærroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || dhekærmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || dhekæryaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godhekærnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godhekærnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godhekærnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godhekærnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || dhokfarasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || dhokfarshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || dhokfarroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || dhokfarmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || dhokfaryaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godhokfarnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godhokfarnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godhokfarnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godhokfarnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
